chartPattern.explanation: The price action shows a rounded bottom forming a cup from late December 2025 to late February 2026, with lows around $69.15 to $74.82. A subsequent downward drift from late February to early March 2026 forms a handle, with prices reaching lows around $70.37. The price then rallies to $119.38 on April 10th, 2026, and consolidates in a handle-like pattern from April 10th to May 29th, 2026, with highs around $121.86 and lows around $102.3.
chartPattern.signal: A confirmed breakout above the handle's resistance level, ideally on increasing volume, could signal a continuation of the prior uptrend, with potential upside targets based on the depth of the cup.

fundamentals.name: CoreWeave, Inc.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: CoreWeave, Inc. operates as a cloud infrastructure technology company in the United States. The company offers CoreWeave Cloud platform that comprises proprietary software and cloud services that deliver the automation and efficiency needed to manage complex artificial intelligence (AI) infrastructure at scale. It also offers data and storage solutions, such as Local Object Transport Accelerator; infrastructure control solutions, including CoreWeave Kubernetes service; mission control services, including node, rack, and fleet lifecycle management; model and agent development tools comprising Weights & Biases, an AI developer platform; and runtime acceleration. In addition, the company offers graphics processing unit compute, CPU compute, networking services, managed services, and virtual and bare metal servers. Its services also include visual effects rendering, machine learning, pixel streaming, and batch processing. The company was formerly known as Atlantic Crypto Corporation and changed its name to CoreWeave, Inc. in December 2019. CoreWeave, Inc. was incorporated in 2017 and is based in Livingston, New Jersey.

judgment.summary: Rapidly growing revenue but significant losses and high debt characterize this speculative AI infrastructure play.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter missed EPS estimates by 16.3%; next earnings date is 2026-05-07.
positives: Revenue growth 111.6% YoY — exceptional top-line expansion.
Gross margin 69.4% — strong unit economics on delivered services.
Mean analyst target $138.56 suggests upside from current levels.
negatives: Operating margin -6.9% and Profit margin -25.6% — currently unprofitable at the operating and net levels.
Forward P/E -199.48 and negative earnings growth estimates — priced for extreme future growth.
Debt/Equity 738.54 and Total debt $35.15B vs $2.27B cash — very high leverage.
Free cash flow (TTM) $-8.56B — significant cash burn.
Return on equity -40.7% — deeply negative profitability on equity.

news.paragraph: CoreWeave (CRWV) is seeing positive momentum following Michael Dell's announcement of the delivery of the first Nvidia Vera Rubin NVL72 server rack to the company. This news, coupled with analyst admiration for its AI pivot and a prediction that the stock could triple by 2030, suggests strong forward-looking sentiment. The company's data center utilization is also expected to accelerate due to growth in autonomous agents.
